characters.name: "Nose Bleed" Woman
characters.description: "Nose Bleed" WomanGeneral informationVoiced byNoneFirst appearanceP.T.A.Last appearanceNose BleedBackground informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairRed (Nose Bleed)Blonde (P.T.A.)Age20s or 30s (estimated)The unnamed"Nose Bleed" Womanis a minor character inBeavis and Butt-Head. After many stupid attempts to cureBeavis' severe nosebleed have failed,Butt-Headapproaches this woman as soon as she leaves theMaxi-Mart's restroom and bluntly tells her "Here's a quarter - could you buy me one of those things that you put in your thing when you have your thing?" This results in him getting punched in the face by the redhead. Butt-Head does manage to obtain a few tampons after all though, which comes in handy as he now also has a nosebleed. In the end, they are back on their couch in front of the TV, mindlessly spouting tampon commercial cliches. She also appears as a blonde in "P.T.A." and thecomics. She seems to be an aggressive woman that knows how to stand her ground, as she punched Butt-Head enough to make his nose bleed when asking for tampons at a gas station.
characters.personality_section: She seems to be an aggressive woman that knows how to stand her ground, as she punched Butt-Head enough to make his nose bleed when asking for tampons at a gas station.

characters.name: "Spare Me" Girls
characters.description: "Spare Me" GirlsGeneral informationVoiced byChristine Walters(Spare Me)Jennifer Emerson(Spanish Fly)First appearanceSpare MeLast appearanceMassage(brunette)Crying(blonde)Background informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairDark brownBlondeJobStudents atHighland High SchoolThe "Spare Me" Girlsare minor characters inBeavis and Butt-Head. They were two girls who attendedHighland High School, and appeared as common objects of lust forBeavisandButt-Head. The two made their first appearance in theSeason 5episode "Spare Me", in which they run into Beavis and Butt-Head while out driving. They ask the duo to fix their flat tire in exchange for a 'ride'. The duo try several times to fix the tire, believing they will get to score with the girls, but all their attempts fail. Eventually,Dariashows up and finishes the job for them and the girls drive off, blowing kisses. Not long afterwards they experience engine trouble, and again ask the duo to help them out for a 'ride'. They later appear in the episode "Spanish Fly", in which the duo attempt to spike their lunches with some Spanish Fly and fail, and end up spiking the blonde's boyfriend,Tommyinstead. They can also be seen sitting in the back of the health class in "Just for Girls", in one of Butt-Head's dreams during the episode "Nothing Happening", and once more amongst the crowd in  "Beavis and Butt-Head Are Dead". The blonde girl appears alone inBurger Worldin theVirtual Stupidityvideo game's intro cutscene and cameos in twoSeason 8episodes, “Werewolves of Highland” and “Crying”. The brunette is also seen making a brief appearance among a crowd inBeavis and Butt-Head Do America.

characters.name: "Vidiots" Woman
characters.description: "Vidiots" WomanGeneral informationVoiced byChristine WaltersFirst appearanceVidiotsBackground informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairBlondeJobReceptionist at Desperate Embrace Dating ServiceTheunnamed receptionistis a minor character that appears in theSeason 6episode "Vidiots". She works at the 'Desperate Embrace Dating Service', a video dating service thatBeavisandButt-Headenter in the hopes of getting dates. She seems oblivious to their crass responses to a questionnaire, believing that they are deliberately being funny. She quickly becomes smitten with Beavis, dropping numerous hints regarding her interest in him. Beavis doesn't pick up on this, and tells her his name is "Geraldo" (having earlier seen a Geraldo Rivera program in which a convicted criminal that obtained victims through a dating service had said that you shouldn't give your real name when dealing with them - implying that that is why he was caught). She later calls the house, asking for 'Geraldo'. Butt-Head answers the phone and tells her (for the last time) that "There aren't any Mexicans here". The receptionist has blonde hair and wears a dark blue t-shirt, an orange dress, lipstick, black shoes and stockings.

characters.name: 8th Grade Girl
characters.description: The8th Grade Girlis a character that appears in the episode "Held Back". After the duo are demoted to 8th grade, Butt-Head puts his hand on her shoulder and asks her "ever been with an older man?" She slaps him and tells him "leave me alone, you loser!"

characters.name: Abby and Beth
characters.description: Abby and BethGeneral informationVoiced byEmily Arlook(Abby)Ally Maki(Beth)First appearanceTime TravelersLast appearanceBreeding Frenzy(Beth only)Background informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairGinger (Abby)Dark brown (Beth)Age20s (estimated)FamilyJeremy (Abby's boyfriend)Beth's unnamed boyfriendBeth's unnamed dogAbby and Bethare a pair of minor characters in the 2022 revival ofBeavis and Butt-Head. They are the "future chicks"BeavisandButt-Headmeet in the episode "Time Travelers". Abby is voiced byEmily Arlookand Beth is voiced byAlly Maki, who both previously voicedAva and Eloise. Abby has ginger hair and wears a green V-neck shirt with blue jeans and brown shoes. Beth has short dark brown hair and wears a pink shirt with a purple-ish jacket over it with dark magenta pants and off-white shoes. She also wears a teal crossbody purse. They are nice women who show genuine concern seeing Beavis' arm severely broken.
characters.personality_section: They are nice women who show genuine concern seeing Beavis' arm severely broken.

characters.description: Abstinence GirlGeneral informationVoiced byMarla BlackFirst appearanceSpiritual JourneyBackground informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairBlondeJobStudent atHighland High SchoolMember of an abstinence groupReligionChristianThe unnamedAbstinence Girlis a minor character inBeavis and Butt-Head. She is a member ofHighland High School's abstinence group, along with her friendAudrey. She says that due to her abstinence and faith inGod, she is "filled up with joy," which of courseBeavisandButt-Headmisinterpret in a sexual way. She is voiced byMarla Black. TBA TBA TBA

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: —Albert walking in on his wife with Beavis and Butt-Head, "Old Man Beavis" AlbertGeneral informationVoiced byPiotr MichaelFirst appearanceOld Man BeavisLast appearanceOldholioBackground informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairGrayBlack (in his youth)Age70s-80s (assumed)FamilyPearl(wife)Unnamed kidsAlbert is a minor character in the 2022 revival ofBeavis and Butt-Head. He is the husband of Pearl and a resident atSunset Acres Care Centerwho first appears in the episode "Old Man Beavis". Albert is an old man who wears a blue vest and khaki pants, along with glasses. He is seen requiring a cane to move around, which doubles as a weapon for him. Albert is a confrontational but faithful man who does not hesitate to beat Beavis and Butt-Head when he walked in on them with his wife. It can be inferred that Pearl and Albert have had a rocky relationship as they have gotten older, as Pearl was seeking new love in Beavis when he was accidentally dropped off at the senior center. Despite catching Pearl unbuttoning her shirt in front of Beavis, he still protected her and seems to still love and value her. In "Oldholio", he is waiting in line thepharmacy, but is not seen with Pearl. Other seniors from "Old Man Beavis" can be seen in waiting in line as well.

characters.name: Alonzo
characters.description: AlonzoGeneral informationVoiced byCarlos AlazraquiFirst appearanceBoxed InLast appearanceBeavis H.Background informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairLight brownAge15-17 (estimated)JobStudent atHighland High SchoolAlonzois a minor character in the 2022 revival ofBeavis and Butt-Head. He is one ofBeavisandButt-Head's classmates atHighland High School. He is voiced byCarlos Alazraqui, whose only speaking role was in "Freaky Friday". Alonzo is a young man with short light brown hair, wearing a dark blue baseball cap over it (except in "Are You There God? It's Me, Beavis"). He wears a reddish-pink long-sleeved shirt, blue jean shorts, and brown shoes with white socks. Not much is known about Alonzo, as he mostly just in the background of the classroom. He is shown to be apathetic towards Beavis and Butt-Head just like everyone else. Other than that, not much is known about him and he is yet to have a direct interaction with them. characters.name: Amy Asskowitz
characters.description: Amy AsskowitzGeneral informationVoiced byChristine LaGuardiaFirst appearanceBeavis and Butt-Head Are DeadLast appearanceBeavis and Butt-Head Do U(lookalike)Background informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairDark brownLight brown (Season 8)Blonde (Do U)JobFormer student atHighland High SchoolAmy Asskowitzis a minor character inBeavis and Butt-Head. She was one ofBeavisandButt-Head's classmates atHighland High Schoolin the original run of the series. She is voiced byChristine LaGuardia. She only appears in the original series' finale, "Beavis and Butt-Head Are Dead", in which she is interviewed about Beavis and Butt-Head on the news. She tells thenews anchorthat "those two were always hitting on me", leading to a flashback in which she slaps Butt-Head when he hits on her in class. Butt-Head claims that isn't how he remembered it, leading to a flashback where she sits on his lap and tells him that she 'always wanted him'. She can be seen amongst the crowd in the background for the remainder of the episode. Lookalikes of her appear in two episodes ofSeason 8and another inBeavis and Butt-Head Do U. TBA
characters.personality_section: TBA

characters.name: ATF Agent Flemming
characters.description: ATF Agent FlemmingGeneral informationVoiced byRobert StackFirst appearanceBeavis and Butt-Head Do AmericaBackground informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairGrayAge50s-60s (estimated)JobAgent of Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and ExplosivesATF Agent Ryan[1]Flemmingis one of the two central antagonists (alongsideMuddy Grimes) of the movieBeavis and Butt-Head Do America. He is an ATF officer who will do anything to trackBeavisandButt-Headdown, as he knows that one of them is carrying theX-5 Unit. He is voiced by the lateRobert Stack. When Beavis and Butt-Head become mixed up with Muddy andDallas Grimesand get mistaken for carrying the X-5 Unit, Agent Flemming does all he can to track down the duo and save America from the terrible consequences of the unit. When the boys destroy the Hoover Dam, he believes that they destroyed it deliberately to cut the power and escape. He is known for assigning unnecessary cavity searches viaFBI Agent Hurly, reasoning that "you can never be too careful." He later getsMr. Van Driessenarrested when he questions him about Beavis and Butt-Head, believing he's somehow involved. Van Driessen didn't answer anything and was taken into custody. He also scolds atPrincipal McVickerfor "harboring two criminal masterminds". TBA
characters.personality_section: TBA

When Beavis and Butt-Head become mixed up with Muddy andDallas Grimesand get mistaken for carrying the X-5 Unit, Agent Flemming does all he can to track down the duo and save America from the terrible consequences of the unit. When the boys destroy the Hoover Dam, he believes that they destroyed it deliberately to cut the power and escape. He is known for assigning unnecessary cavity searches viaFBI Agent Hurly, reasoning that "you can never be too careful." He later getsMr. Van Driessenarrested when he questions him about Beavis and Butt-Head, believing he's somehow involved. Van Driessen didn't answer anything and was taken into custody. He also scolds atPrincipal McVickerfor "harboring two criminal masterminds". TBA

characters.name: Audrey
characters.description: AudreyGeneral informationVoiced byKosha PatelFirst appearanceSpiritual JourneyLast appearanceNutsBackground informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairBlondeJobStudent atHighland High SchoolMember of an abstinence groupMember of the Highland Teen Outreach ProgramReligionChristianAudreyis a minor character in the 2022 revival ofBeavis and Butt-Head. She is a Christian student inHighland High School, whoBeavisandButt-Headcome across sometimes. She is voiced byKosha Patel. Audrey first appears in theSeason 9episode "Spiritual Journey", where she invites Beavis and Butt-Head to join her abstinence group to help them get over their obsession with sex and focus more on their studies. There, the duo cause a scene when they think that she, as well as all the other women in the group, wants to get it on with them. She appears again in theSeason 11episode "Nuts", where she comes across a depressed Beavis in the school cafeteria, and offers him her support as part ofHighland's teenage outreach program. Beavis tries to explain to Audrey that he got terrible news from a doctor, which she takes to mean that he has a terminal medical condition (in reality, Beavis has a nut allergy, which he thought meant that he could never masturbate again). She ends up accidentally scaring Beavis off when she puts her hand on his shoulder, since he thinks that she is coming on on him. Audrey is generally portrayed as kind-hearted. She is one of the few girls in the franchise to be genuinely friendly to the duo, as she tries to help them out when they are in need of it. However, she does have her limits with them, as she was shown disgusted when Beavis removed his shirt and cheered when he thought that he was going to "score" at the abstinence group; according to Butt-Head, sometime after that, she told them that they would only "score" if they were the last men on Earth.
characters.personality_section: Audrey is generally portrayed as kind-hearted. characters.name: Ava and Eloise
characters.description: Ava and EloiseGeneral informationVoiced byEmily Arlook(Ava)Ally Maki(Eloise)First appearanceEscape RoomLast appearanceThe Warrior(Ava)The Good Deed(Eloise)Background informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairGinger (Ava)Dark Brown (Eloise)JobStudents atHighland High SchoolAva and Eloiseare a pair of minor characters in the 2022 revival ofBeavis and Butt-Head. They first appear in "Escape Room", where they find out that the titular escape room requires a minimum of four people, but their friends cancelled. The girls then noticeBeavisandButt-Headmessing with milk cartons outside and invite them to be their other two participants, much to their delight. The boys leave them to pay and accidentally enter the bathroom instead of the escape room, leaving the girls to wait for them for a while until the employee finds two other more attractive men called Kyle and Brad to join them instead, which they agree to. The four solve the room together in record time and leave just as Beavis and Butt-Head finally leave the bathroom, with them figuring that the girls were intimidated by their "smarts". Ava appears in the cafeteria atHighland High Schoolin "Nice Butt-Head", "Weird Girl", and "The Warrior", and both her and Eloise were last seen together as of now at the school dance in "The Good Deed".

characters.name: Bartender
characters.description: BartenderGeneral informationVoiced byMike Flanigin(Dumbasses Anonymous)Sam Johnson(P.T.A.)Kristofor Brown(Bungholio: Lord of the Harvest+Ding-Dong-Ditch)First appearanceBungholio: Lord of the HarvestLast appearanceMassageBackground informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairBrown/redAge30s (estimated)JobBartender (Dumbasses Anonymous)The unnamedBartenderis a recurring background character inBeavis and Butt-Head. He first appears in theSeason 6Halloween special, "Bungholio: Lord of the Harvest", while out trick-or-treating with his two children. He makes frequent appearances throughout the rest of Season 6,Season 7, andSeason 8. TBA

characters.name: Beatnik Woman
characters.description: Beatnik WomanGeneral informationVoiced byTracy GrandstaffFirst appearanceButtniksBackground informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairDark redAge20s (estimated)TheBeatnik Womanis a character that appears in theSeason 5episode "Buttniks" where she performs a suggestive poem that excites Beavis and Butt-Head outside a cafe, convincing them to enter.

characters.name: Beatnik Woman

characters.name: Beavis
characters.description: —Beavis, "Tech Support" BeavisGeneral informationVoiced byMike JudgeHenry Witcher(Younger self inThe Special OneandBike)First appearanceFrog BaseballLast appearanceGet Well Soon(regular Beavis)Oldholio(Old BeavisandCornholio)The Discoverers(Smart Beavis)Background informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairBlondAge15FamilyMr. Beavis(biological father)Shirley Beavis(mother)Uncle BobUnnamed grandmotherUnnamed grandfatherUnnamed first cousin twice removedJobStudent atHighland High SchoolFry cook atBurger WorldATF Agent (movie) "Hey, how's it goin'?"— One of Beavis' catchphrases. Originally starting out as a "sidekick and a follower", Beavis eventually turned into a "loose cannon" as the show went on. He is oblivious to what should be the obvious and is "a zero" in terms of intellect. Contrasting against Butt-Head's more dominant and brash personality, Beavis is more submissive and often tolerates his physical and verbal confrontations, usually without retaliating. However, even Beavis has his limits. There have been occasions in which Beavis has stood up for himself and attacked Butt-Head. In "Murder Site", he was driven to the brink of going postal and nearly killing Butt-Head, the latter of whom would not refrain from calling him a "butt-knocker", a term which Beavis inexplicably resents. While viewing a Bon Jovi video, Butt-Head assaulted Beavis because he liked the song that was playing. In retaliation, Beavis kicked him in the testicles twice and shouted, "You can't tell me what sucks! I like this, so blow it up your ass!" A similar case happened when they were watching Katy Perry's "Firework", where Beavis kept calling himself a "firework", but Butt-Head kept saying he wasn't, which eventually caused Beavis to kick him in the testicles and exclaim "I am a firework! I'm an M-80!". During Rancid's "Nihilism", Beavis randomly had enough of Butt-Head, and left him on the floor after kicking him in the testicles. When Butt-Head disrespected Metallica, Beavis got especially defensive and threatened to kick Butt-Head's ass. In the bookThis Book Sucks, Beavis was the smarter and more dominant of the two, but eventually, Beavis just became a side-kick. Beavis seems to gain a small bit of intelligence in later seasons, being able to use a photocopier and, also, holding back on copying his butt (until Butt-Head suggested it). He is shown to be a pyromaniac, as evidenced by his chant of "Fire! Fire!". During the original series run, Beavis was no longer allowed to say "fire" after somewoman in Ohio claimed an episode where Beavis did his fire thing caused her son to burn her trailer and kill his sister in the blaze. Therefore, Beavis was reduced to saying things like "Fryer!" (when he's atBurger World) or "Liar!LIAR!Liar, liar, pants on... whoa!" ("Liar! Liar!"). It wasn't until the 2011 revival that Beavis was let off the hook and given a clean slate (with his "Fire!" catchphrase making an epic return while reviewing MGMT's "Kids"). Despite his passive beha

characters.name: Beavis (Call of Duty)
characters.description: Beaviswas featured as an Operator of the Rogue Black Ops faction inCall of Duty: Black Ops 6andCall of Duty: Warzone 2.0. He was released during Season Four Reloaded ofBlack Ops 6on July 2nd, 2025 as part of theBeavis and Butt-HeadEvent Pass Premium Track Offering.

characters.description: —Beavis' in-game description Beavis, along withButt-Head, was featured as an Outfit inFortnite, as part of theBeavis and Butt-HeadSet. He costs 1,500 V-Bucks and was released inChapter 6: Season 4on September 6, 2025.

characters.name: Beavis H.
characters.description: This page is about the character Beavis H.. For the episode of the same name,click here.Beavis H.General informationVoiced byJosh BrenerFirst appearanceBeavis H.Background informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairOrangeAge15-17 (estimated)FamilyUnnamed momJobStudent atHighland High SchoolBeavis H.is a minor character in the 2022 revival ofBeavis and Butt-Head. He is one ofBeavisandButt-Head's classmates atHighland High School, as of theSeason 11episode "Beavis H.". Beavis H. is a young man with short orange hair, he wears a white long-sleeved shirt, green pants, and gray and white shoes. Beavis H. is a nice and friendly kid who immediately makes friends with Beavis and Butt-Head whenMr. Van Driessenassigns him to sit next to the "regular Beavis" as he calls himself in this episode. They are easily annoyed by Beavis H.'s constant whispering, but he doesn't seem to pick up on it and continues to hang out with them during lunch, where Beavis lashes out at him and he still wants to be their friends. It's not until Butt-Head makes fun ofthe other Beavis' momat theMaxi-Mart(eventually kicking him the crotch) that he stops following the duo, realizing they weren't as "cool" as he once thought. He leaves Butt-Head and the other Beavis on the ground in pain to do homework witha girlhe met in the cafeteria. characters.name: Beavis' Imaginary Children
characters.description: Beavis' Imaginary ChildrenGeneral informationVoiced byHenry WitcherFirst appearanceVasectomiesBackground informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairBlondFamilyOld Beavis(imaginary father)Beavis' Imaginary Childrenare minor characters inBeavis and Butt-Head. They are three hypothetical childrenOld Beavisimagines fathering in the episode "Vasectomies". Their first names are not revealed in the episode. Oldest: He resembles his dad, although his eyes are closer together and his nose is smaller. Although he still has his signature pointed nose. He wears a grey shirt and blue shorts. This is the opposite to what Beavis wore as a teenager (blue shirt with grey shorts.)

characters.name: Ben
characters.description: BenGeneral informationVoiced byDean Julian(Politically Correct)First appearanceScientific StuffLast appearanceBeavis and Butt-Head Do UBackground informationGenderMale ♂RaceAfrican-AmericanHairBlackAge15-16 (estimated)JobFormer student atHighland High SchoolBenis a minor recurring character inBeavis and Butt-Head. He was one ofBeavisandButt-Head's classmates atHighland High Schoolin the original run of the series and the2011 revival. His name is only mentioned on model sheets. Ben is an African-American teen with short, curly black hair and a goatee. He is often seen with headphones over his ears and a Walkman in his pocket. He wears a t-shirt and pants in a variety of colors throughout the show. InSeason 2(save for "Sick" and "Washing the Dog"), he was consistently portrayed wearing a red shirt with a white collar and green pants. InSeasons 4and5, he wears a light green shirt with darker green pants. InSeason 7, he wears a purple/yellow shirt with blue jeans. In "Walkathon", he has a small anchor tattoo on his left arm. InSeason 8, an identical character with longer hair appears in Ben's place and wears a yellow t-shirt with gray cargo shorts and brown sandals.

characters.name: Benny Hill
characters.description: Benny HillGeneral informationFirst appearanceChokeBackground informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairGreyJobComedianBenny Hill(1924-1992) was an English comedian who starred onThe Benny Hill Show. Beavis and Butt-Head first watch his show in the episode "Choke" where they laugh at Hill repeatedly saying "I got me finga stuck in me bum" and are confused by his line "I never should have listened to that little Dutch boy down by the dike." Butt-Head chokes on chicken while laughing, leading to the plot of the episode. The duo watch Hill saying "I got me finga stuck in me bum" a second time at the hospital in "Butt Flambe."

characters.name: Benny Hill
characters.description: Benny HillGeneral informationFirst appearanceChokeBackground informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairGreyJobComedianBenny Hill(1924-1992) was an English comedian who starred onThe Benny Hill Show. Butt-Head chokes on chicken while laughing, leading to the plot of the episode. The duo watch Hill saying "I got me finga stuck in me bum" a second time at the hospital in "Butt Flambe."

characters.name: Betsy Wiener
characters.description: Betsy WienerGeneral informationVoiced byTracy GrandstaffLori Nasso(lookalikes inSeason 8)First appearanceLightning StrikesLast appearanceUnderwearBackground informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairBlondeAgelate 40s-50s (estimated) Betsy Wieneris a minor character inBeavis and Butt-Head. She first appears in theSeason 5episode "Lightning Strikes", where she is a member of the group "Decency in Media", and blames music videos forBeavisandButt-Head's actions that lead to them being struck by lightning. In actuality, they were influenced by a PBS documentary onBenjamin Franklinand his famous kite experiment. Betsy uses their description of Franklin, as "some old dude with long hair and glasses", to insinuate that they were influenced byHoward Stern. She eventually checks the TV listings that prove that the two were watching the Franklin documentary at the time, but doubts that she can twist the fact to fit her group's motives. She later tells TV news outlets outside of the hospital that the boys were imitating music videos while stating that "we're not saying that there was a connection, but the coincidence is difficult to ignore!" She also made a short appearance inP.T.A., offering suggestions and improvements for the students ofHighland High School. She seemed concerned when Beavis and Butt-head told the faculty members aboutCoach Buzzcutand how he treats them.

characters.name: Biker Lady
characters.description: Biker LadyGeneral informationVoiced byPenelope TrudFirst appearanceFriday NightLast appearanceVirtual StupidityBackground informationGenderFemale ♀RaceCaucasianHairRed-BrownBlonde (in the comics)Age20s (estimated)TheBiker Ladyis an attractive yet gruff-looking female motorcycle rider that first appears in "Friday Night". During the episode, she uses bothBeavisandButt-Headas accessories to shoplift items at theMaxi-Mart.  Once theclerksuspects them, she escapes by throwing hot coffee in his face and taking the boys along for a ride on her motorcycle before abandoning them to seek her own adventures. The Biker Lady can also be seen making brief background appearances at theCreatures of Rockconcert in "Take a Number". In theMarveltie-incomics, she (or at least various women with her design) can be seen around town working odd jobs. In theSNESgame, she appears as an enemy at theGWARconcert, wielding a chain whip. She is last seen in theVirtual Stupiditygame, sitting among the female prisoners on the police van. In most of her appearances, the Biker Lady can be seen with long red/brown hair. She wears a blue jacket with the sleeves torn, a black bra, fingerless gloves, spiked bracelets, grey pants and knee-high heeled boots. In the comics, she is always depicted with blonde hair.

Once theclerksuspects them, she escapes by throwing hot coffee in his face and taking the boys along for a ride on her motorcycle before abandoning them to seek her own adventures. The Biker Lady can also be seen making brief background appearances at theCreatures of Rockconcert in "Take a Number". In theMarveltie-incomics, she (or at least various women with her design) can be seen around town working odd jobs. In theSNESgame, she appears as an enemy at theGWARconcert, wielding a chain whip. She is last seen in theVirtual Stupiditygame, sitting among the female prisoners on the police van. In most of her appearances, the Biker Lady can be seen with long red/brown hair. She wears a blue jacket with the sleeves torn, a black bra, fingerless gloves, spiked bracelets, grey pants and knee-high heeled boots. In the comics, she is always depicted with blonde hair.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: BillGeneral informationVoiced byKristofor BrownFirst appearanceForeign ExchangeLast appearanceSteamrollerBackground informationGenderMale ♂RaceCaucasianHairBlackAge50s-60s (estimated)Billis a minor character inBeavis and Butt-Head. He isTom Anderson's neighbor, whose biggest role was in the episode "Steamroller". He is not to be confused withBill, the bartender at the American Legion Hall. Bill recommended that Anderson rent a steamroller from Morgan's to do his paving job. While the two of them take a break to drink a beer, Beavis and Butt-Head take the steamroller (which Anderson has left running because it was difficult to start earlier) and drive it around town looking forTodd. Their destructive path takes them through several yards in the neighborhood, through the main entrance of the Botanical Gardens and through the hallways ofHighland High School, where they break through the wall of the faculty lounge. By the time Bill and Anderson finish their break Beavis and Butt-Head have returned the steamroller and turned the engine off, much to Anderson's dismay. Beavis and Butt-Head have flattened part of Bill's new hedge and spread tar from Anderson's paving project over it. Anderson punches Bill in the resulting argument over paying for the damage. TBA TBA
